titleStmt.title: SII 11.112: original edition by C. R. Krishnamacharlu, R. S. Panchamukhi, N. Lakshminaraya Rao and H. K. Narasimhaswami
No. 112. (B.K. No. 33 of 1927-28). KUṆṬŌJI, RON TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A BROKEN SLAB STANDING CLOSE TO THE TEMPLE OF ĪŚVARA.

summary.p: The inscription belongs to the reign of Bhuvanaikamalladēva (Sōmēśvara II) and commences with the mention of Gurubhakti-Paṇḍita of (the temple of) Nakarēśvara. It records the gift of oil-mills, house-sites and flower-garden to the temple of Nakarēśvara at Kūṁṭe, (modern Kuṇṭōji, Ron Taluk, Dharwar District) by the Nakaras (merchants), and of an oil-mill for the perpetual lamp in the same temple by Veṁkapaiya, the suṅka-vergaḍe (Toll Superintendent) of Kūṁṭige-Thirty ṭhāṇa.

The record is dated Śaka 994, Parīdhāvin, Paushya, śu 12The actualEphemeris was śu. 11; see. Ep. Rep. 1928. App. F, p. 37.,Sunday, Uttarāyaṇasaṅkrānti.An inscription of 1927-28).The corresponding English date is A.D. 1072, December 23, Sunday, on which day the saṅkrānti actually commenced.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
nakarēsvarada garubhaktipaṇḍitaru sāsana
© svasti śrīprithivīvallabha mahārājā
dhirāja paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka
satyaśrayakuḷatiḷaka cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatu bhuvanaika malladēvara vijayarāThe letters bhuvanaika are corrected from tribhuvana which appears to have been originally written on the stone.
jyamuttarōttarābhivriddhipravarddha mānamā
caṁdrārkkātārāṁbara saluttamire sva
sti sakhavarṣa 994 paridhāvisaṁvatsa
rada pauṣya suddha 12 Ādivāramu
ttarāyaṇa saṁkrāntiyandu śrīma
t nakarēsvaradēvargge nakaraṁ koṭṭa soṁṭige
yondu peṟuvokkalu pēṟi bandasūḷo
ḷ Okkalalu baḷḷavondu dēvara dakṣiṇa
diśābhāgadoḷ sarvvamānyamā
gi biṭṭa mana nālku mattaṁ dēvargge daḍa
gina bīciseṭṭiya keṟeyiṁ teṁka pūdōṁ
ṭa kamma 45 mattaṁ nakharēsvara dēva
ra nandādīvigege Ūralu mūṟu
gāṇa poragāgenitu gāṇa
mādoḍe gāṇadaleṇne soḷasiṁ
ge vondu . śrīmatu kūṁṭage
muvattara ṭhāṇāṁdarada suṁkha
verggaḍe veṁkapaiya kūṁṭeya
bīḍina nakharēsvaradēvara nandādīvi
gege ṇa 1 svadattaṁ
ndhara ṣaṣṭi
jā yatē
ḷamahā
Digital edition of SII 11.112 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
